context: Tests whether the agent designs the coupon schema with the exact column names, data types, constraints, and indexes specified in the coupon-management skill — including both the coupons and coupon_redemptions tables.

checklist.name: Coupons table exists
checklist.description: A CREATE TABLE statement for a table named exactly 'coupons' is present

checklist.name: Redemptions table exists
checklist.description: A CREATE TABLE statement for a table named exactly 'coupon_redemptions' is present

checklist.name: UUID primary key with gen_random_uuid
checklist.description: The coupons table id column is UUID PRIMARY KEY with DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()

checklist.name: Code column type and constraint
checklist.description: The code column is VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE

checklist.name: Type CHECK constraint
checklist.description: The type column has a CHECK constraint that restricts values to exactly ('percentage', 'fixed_amount', 'free_shipping')

checklist.name: Numeric precision for money columns
checklist.description: value, min_order_amount, max_discount_amount, and discount_amount columns use NUMERIC(10,2)

checklist.name: Nullable usage_limit
checklist.description: usage_limit is defined as INTEGER with no NOT NULL constraint (nullable to represent unlimited)

checklist.name: TIMESTAMPTZ for date columns
checklist.description: starts_at, expires_at, redeemed_at, and created_at columns use TIMESTAMPTZ (not TIMESTAMP or DATE)

checklist.name: Product/category arrays
checklist.description: product_ids and category_ids columns are defined as UUID[] (PostgreSQL arrays)

checklist.name: Code lookup index
checklist.description: An index on the coupons code column is defined (e.g. idx_coupons_code ON coupons(code))

checklist.name: Redemptions lookup index
checklist.description: A composite index on coupon_redemptions covering both customer_id and coupon_id is defined

checklist.name: Redemptions foreign key
checklist.description: coupon_redemptions.coupon_id references coupons(id) via a FOREIGN KEY constraint
